title: ‘Golden Gift to White House’: Trump shares AI image of giant eagle for 250th anniversary
summary_full: US President Donald Trump shared an AI-generated image of a golden eagle on the White House balcony, calling it a "Golden Gift" for the nation's 250th anniversary. The White House reposted the image, sparking debate about its authenticity. The image, featuring architectural discrepancies and fewer stars on a shield, was confirmed to be AI-generated. This follows Trump's recent unveiling of a commemorative US passport design.
